untranslatable_reason: Flag pattern recognition requires visual/geometric pattern detection (flag consolidation zone identification, breakout confirmation) which cannot be expressed with simple indicator crossovers and thresholds. The specific breakout direction, consolidation bounds, and pattern structure need dedicated pattern detection logic not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using ADX for trend confirmation and SMA crossovers for directional bias. However, this loses the core flag pattern logic. True implementation requires: (1) identification of flag consolidation zone (parallel support/resistance), (2) detection of preceding impulse move, (3) confirmation of breakout direction. The statistical outcomes cited (23% avg rise in bull markets, 17% in bear markets, etc.) cannot be embedded in entry rules—these are performance metrics, not entry conditions. Author provides no explicit exit rules (AUTHOR_SILENT), so reversal at trend line is assumed.
